data.author: David Dorf
data.message: Initial commit with basic sub and service

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+.vscode
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.8)
+project(lightning_rrt)
+
+if(NOT CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD)
+    set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 14)
+endif()
+
+if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
+    add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
+endif()
+
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+find_package(rclcpp REQUIRED)
+find_package(std_srvs REQUIRED)
+find_package(std_msgs REQUIRED)
+find_package(geometry_msgs REQUIRED)
+find_package(nav_msgs REQUIRED)
+
+add_executable(lightning_rrt src/lightning_rrt.cpp)
+
+target_link_libraries(lightning_rrt PUBLIC rclcpp::rclcpp ${std_srvs_TARGETS})
+target_link_libraries(lightning_rrt PUBLIC rclcpp::rclcpp ${std_msgs_TARGETS})
+target_link_libraries(lightning_rrt PUBLIC rclcpp::rclcpp ${geometry_msgs_TARGETS})
+target_link_libraries(lightning_rrt PUBLIC rclcpp::rclcpp ${nav_msgs_TARGETS})
+
+install(TARGETS
+  lightning_rrt
+  DESTINATION lib/${PROJECT_NAME})
+
+ament_package()

@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" ?>
+<?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format3.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
+<package format="3">
+  <name>lightning_rrt</name>
+  <version>0.0.0</version>
+  <description>Fast smoothed RRT path planner with ROS 2 interfaces</description>
+  <maintainer email="davidjohndorf@gmail.com">David Dorf</maintainer>
+  <license>MIT</license>
+
+  <depend>rclcpp</depend>
+  <depend>std_msgs</depend>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <test_depend>ament_lint_auto</test_depend>
+  <test_depend>ament_lint_common</test_depend>
+
+  <export>
+    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
+  </export>
+</package>

data.author: david-dorf
data.message:
Create README.md with package details

Added installation and usage instructions for the lightning_rrt package.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+# lightning_rrt
+ROS 2 Jazzy package for obtaining 2D navigation paths using the Rapidly-exploring Random Tree (RRT) algorithm.
+
+## Installation
+1. Install ROS 2 Jazzy
+2. Install this package and interfaces using the following command:
+```bash
+sudo apt install ros-jazzy-lightning-rrt ros-jazzy-lightning-rrt-interfaces
+```
+
+## Usage
+See [example.cpp](https://github.com/david-dorf/lightning_rrt/blob/main/src/example_map.cpp) for sending an RRT request. Running the example is as follows:
+
+Terminal 1:
+```bash
+source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash
+ros2 run lightning_rrt example_map
+```
+
+Terminal 2:
+```bash
+source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash
+ros2 run lightning_rrt visualize
+```
+
+Terminal 3:
+```bash
+source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash
+ros2 run rviz2 rviz2
+```
+
+Path, map, and start/goal markers can be visualized and saved to a config through the rviz2 UI.
